name: Queue

unions.name: Queue
unions.comment: A Queue containing items of type `a`.

values.name: deq
values.comment:
Dequeues an item from the Queue.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.deq
      -- == (Just 1, Queue.empty)
values.type: Queue a -> ( Maybe a, Queue a )

values.name: enq
values.comment:
Enqueues an item to the Queue.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.toList
      -- == [1]

values.name: enqMany
values.comment:
Enqueue count copies of the same item

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.pushMany item 3
    |> Queue.toList
    -- == [ item, item, item ]
values.type: a -> Int -> Queue a -> Queue a

values.name: enqManyFromFunction
values.comment:
Call passed function count times and enqueue each result

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.pushMany (\() -> item) 3
    |> Queue.toList
    -- == [ item, item, item ]
values.type: (() -> a) -> Int -> Queue a -> Queue a

values.name: first
values.comment:
Gets first item of Queue.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.first
      -- == Just 1

values.name: requeue
values.comment:
Dequeue, call a function with to process, and then enqueue.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.enq 3
    |> Queue.requeue increment
    |> Queue.toList
    -- == [ 3, 2 ]

values.name: toList
values.comment:
Converts a Queue into a List.

    Queue.empty
    |> Queue.enq 1
    |> Queue.enq 2
    |> Queue.toList
      -- == [1, 2]

name: Stack

unions.name: Stack
unions.comment: A Stack containing items of type `a`.

values.name: append
values.comment:
Appends a List into the Stack.
    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.append [2, 3]
    |> Stack.toList
      -- == [3, 2, 1]
values.type: List a -> Stack a -> Stack a

values.name: fromList
values.comment:
Converts a List into a Stack

    Stack.fromLista [1, 2]
    |> Stack.push 3
    |> Stack.toList
      -- == [3, 2, 1]

values.name: pop
values.comment:
Pops an item from the Stack.

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.pop
      -- == (Just 1, Stack.empty)
values.type: Stack a -> ( Maybe a, Stack a )

values.name: push
values.comment:
Pushes an item into the Stack.

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.toList
      -- == [1]

values.name: pushMany
values.comment:
Push count copies of the same item

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.pushMany item 3
    |> Stack.toList
    -- == [ item, item, item ]
values.type: a -> Int -> Stack a -> Stack a

values.name: pushManyFromFunction
values.comment:
Call passed function count times and push each result

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.pushMany (\() -> item) 3
    |> Stack.toList
    -- == [ item, item, item ]
values.type: (() -> a) -> Int -> Stack a -> Stack a

values.name: restack
values.comment:
Pop, call a function with to process, and then Push.

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.push 3
    |> Stack.restack increment
    |> Stack.toList
    -- == [ 4, 1 ]

values.name: toList
values.comment:
Converts a Stack into a List

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.push 2
    |> Stack.toList
      -- == [2, 1]

values.name: top
values.comment:
Gets the top of the Stack.

    Stack.empty
    |> Stack.push 1
    |> Stack.top
      -- == Just 1
